process_runs.name: T1 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Training on main equipment
Coating had poor adhesion to the foil. Many visible defects present.

process_runs.name: T10 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Evaluate slurry viscosity agianst mixing time at 600 RPM

process_runs.name: T12 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing for Improved Cycle life, capacity, and FCE

process_runs.name: T13 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Repeat of T12 but striving for process improvements. Experiment with wet mixing of Cx and SiNP
Two variants were made. One -100mesh and one pristine. -100 mesh showed less presence of particle and agglomeration defects.

process_runs.name: T14 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Focus on getting a viable Silicon anode for a prototype.

process_runs.name: T15 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Increase graphite content to stabilize the anode.

process_runs.name: T16 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Increase graphite content to stabilize the anode.

process_runs.name: T17 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Create relatively stable, high capacity anode. Train Lui/Kaitlyn on anode making process.

process_runs.name: T18 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Set of three experiments with Lui/Kait for training purposes and recipe dialing in.

process_runs.name: T19 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Set of three experiments with Lui/Kait for training purposes and recipe dialing in.

process_runs.name: T2 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Tryin to improve solids content of leading recipes.
Still poor adhesion to the foil, similar to T1, but slightly better. Mixing to be improved.

process_runs.name: T20 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Repeat of T18 with Super P for comparison.

process_runs.name: T21 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Increase Si portion to balance capacity and stability.

process_runs.name: T22 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Improve slurry composition, improve performance and stability with CNTs. First attempt for full cell pouch.

process_runs.name: T23 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Improve adhesion and dispersibility compared to T22 and previous.

process_runs.name: T24 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Test against Cx(e) with current standard formulation

process_runs.name: T25 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Test new Si-(Cx) Material. Si200 first test.

process_runs.name: T26 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Test new Si-(Cx) Material. Si100 first test.

process_runs.name: T27 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing of Cx with pure graphite anode for baseline understanding

process_runs.name: T28 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing of conservative Silicon-Graphite Anode

process_runs.name: T29 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Repeat of T27 but with increased binder to attempt and ameliorate potential delamination issues.

process_runs.name: T3 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Experiment for viscosity testing of large mixer.
Results summarized in viscosity testing page.

process_runs.name: T30 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Investigate SiC material without ball milling. Utilized SiC150 (alpha).

process_runs.name: T31 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing of SiC (using the beta formula) to compare against the alpha performance.

process_runs.name: T32 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Test SiC (beta) without addition of Si NPs in conservative Gr anode. Utilize super P as the conductive for baseline.
Very asymetrically sloped left to right. Used the thinner side for testing, approx. 98um total.

process_runs.name: T33 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Test new BTR graphite for comparison against MSE graphite.
Loading very asymetric left to right. Calibration of doctors blade required. Uncal ldg: 12.3mg, thick side Cal 13.53.

process_runs.name: T34 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Retest new BTR graphite for comparison against MSE graphite.
Loading very asymetric left to right. Calibration of doctors blade required. Uncal ldg: 12.3mg, thick side Cal 13.53.

process_runs.name: T35 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26)
Lot's of cracking and agglomerates visualized under microscope.

process_runs.name: T36 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(30). Update mixing to match Brian's style.

process_runs.name: T37 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as filtering for agglomerate removal.
Best electrode quality so far. Pre-dispersion in water, pre-sifting and Small Zr beads seemed to help.

process_runs.name: T38 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(30). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.
Electrode quality was more grainy than T37. Possibly the LiPAA, but mixing procedure was less strict. Will repeat with slower addition of dry materials to solvents.

process_runs.name: T39 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Testing of Jong's recipe with half AST-9005(30), half (26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.

process_runs.name: T4 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Comparison of Super P vs Cx-B as a conductive additive.
Cells did not cycle well or yield reliable data. Will repeat this experiment with standardized materials. Li chips, pressing of electrodes etc.

process_runs.name: T40 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Attempt 3 binder mix to improve dispersion and cohesion.

process_runs.name: T41 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Improve upon T40 by adjusting the mixing strategies.

process_runs.name: T42 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Test newly received Si/C sample from Zhide Technology.
Film smoothness was very good, however, after vacuum drying it was very brittle and prone to cracking.

process_runs.name: T43 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes: Adjust binder system for new Si/C to improve cracking.

process_runs.name: T6 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
High Solids testing, graphite/Cx
Used for testing/comissioning of the press.

process_runs.name: T7 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Viscosity Testing Experiment. Anode Slurry Mixing Process Development. Evaluating new slot die.
Qualitative evaluation of the slot die was carried out. Brian to continue studying the slot die.

process_runs.name: T9 anode sheet process
process_runs.notes:
Training and development for Eli in mixing and coating
Electrode stored. Awaiting Li chips for evaluation.
